commit.message:
Add endpoints for downloading document chunks and files

- Implement POST /v1/namespace/[namespaceId]/documents/[documentId]/chunks-download-url to generate presigned URLs for document chunks, available only for completed documents.
- Implement POST /v1/namespace/[namespaceId]/documents/[documentId]/file-download-url to generate presigned URLs for managed files.
- Update OpenAPI specifications to include new endpoints and their respective response schemas.

Merge pull request #95 from agentset-ai/feat/webhooks

Webhooks

commit.message: upgrade zod and remove patch
update agent rules and skills
update lockfile
add webhooks cache using upstash redis
update cursor rules
query optimizations

Refactor webhook ID handling in layout and edit pages to utilize typed parameters from useParams. Update layout structure for improved styling consistency with flexbox. Enhance loading state presentation with Skeleton components.
optimize webhook emission using waitUntil & refactor emission in ingestion pipeline

Refactor webhook imports to streamline access and enhance modularity. Update package exports to include server-specific functionalities, improving organization and clarity in webhook handling across the application.

Enhance environment configuration by adding emails environment and updating OpenAPI document creation to be synchronous. Refactor webhook schemas to utilize new status schemas and improve event data validation. Update package dependencies and streamline webhook exports.
refactor send-webhook task
fix import
add webhooks package to nextjs transpilePackages
handle webhooks in org + namespace deletion

Refactor ID handling across the application by replacing direct imports from "@/lib/api/ids" with the new utility functions from "@agentset/utils". Update bun.lock and package.json to include the new dependency. Additionally, make the `namespaceId` field in the Document model required and add a migration to enforce this change in the database schema.

Add @agentset/webhooks package and integrate webhook functionality across the application. Update bun.lock and package.json to include new dependencies. Refactor existing webhook handling to utilize the new structure, enhancing event emission and validation processes for documents and ingest jobs.

Refactor email handling in webhook processes by integrating the new sendEmail function from the @agentset/emails package. Remove deprecated references to the resend library and clean up unused webhook cache functionality. Additionally, update dependencies in bun.lock and package.json for improved email rendering and environment management.
fix type errors

Enhance webhook management UI with loading states, skeletons, and improved empty states. Introduce new components for event logging and webhook details, along with a modal for sending test webhooks. Refactor existing components for better structure and usability.
add webhook management features including CRUD operations, event handling, and email notifications
initialize tinybird
update db schema

readme_html:
Features

  • Turnkey RAG: ingestion, chunking, embeddings, and retrieval
  • Model agnostic: works with your choice of LLM, embeddings, and vector DB
  • Chat playground with message editing and citations
  • Production hosting with preview links and custom domains
  • API + typed SDKs, OpenAPI spec
  • Built-in multi-tenancy
  • Built with TypeScript, Next.js, AI SDK, Prisma, Supabase, and Trigger.dev

Getting Started

Agentset Cloud

The fastest way to get started with Agentset. Generous free tier with 1,000 pages and 10,000 retrievals. No credit card required.

  • Sign up: https://app.agentset.ai/login

Self-host Agentset

Follow our complete guide: https://docs.agentset.ai/open-source/self-hosting

Quick Start (Local Development)

# 1) Copy env and fill required values
cp .env.example .env

# 2) Install dependencies
bun install

# 3) Run database migrations (from the repo root)
bun db:deploy

# 4) Start the app
bun dev:web

Useful scripts:

  • bun db:studio – open Prisma Studio
  • bun dev:web – run only the web app

Star Us

If you find Agentset useful, please give the repo a star — it helps a lot!

Contributing

We <3 contributions big and small. Feel free to:

  • Open an issue for bugs and feature ideas
  • Submit a PR with focused changes
  • Improve docs or examples

Not sure where to start? Check existing issues: https://github.com/agentset-ai/agentset/issues

License

MIT :)

Made with ❤️ by the Agentset team.
